nasb.text: ‘You shall not oppress your neighbor, nor rob him. The wages of a hired man are not to remain with you all night until morning.

esv.text: “You shall not oppress your neighbor or rob him. The wages of a hired worker shall not remain with you all night until the morning.

cnv.text: “不可欺壓你的鄰舍，也不可搶奪他的東西；雇工的工錢，不可扣留在你那裡到早晨。

ccb.text: 不可欺压邻居，也不可抢夺他的东西。要当天支付雇工的工钱，不可拖到第二天。
